prompt: An authentic 1920s Bauhaus graphic design. A stark, minimalist abstract composition. A wide, perfectly straight, thick diagonal white channel strictly divides the canvas from top-left to bottom-right. Above the channel, a cluster of perfect primary-red circles rests exactly against the straight top edge of the white channel. Below the channel, a cluster of perfect primary-blue squares rests exactly against the straight bottom edge of the white channel. The strict, unornamented geometric tension clearly depicts a mathematical maximum margin separating two distinct classes in a 2D space. Flat matte colors, severe reduction to essential geometric forms, zero ornamentation, warm off-white background. Absolutely no text, no letters, no characters.
tradition_approach: Targeted Bauhaus reduction to primary colors (red/blue) and basic geometries (circles/squares) arranged under strict diagonal tension, purely translating 'maximum margin separating classes' into abstract geometry.
